<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.40.0-Bratislava">
  <identifier>muziejai</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>LIT</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>muziejai</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links>
    <link name="File Geodatabase Feature Class" description="" size="" type="Local Area Network" format="" mimeType="" url="file://\\EVELINAIND\D$\Evelinos\Muziejai\muziejai.gdb"/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["LKS94 / Lithuania TM",BASEGEOGCRS["LKS94",DATUM["Lithuania 1994 (ETRS89)",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4669]],CONVERSION["Lithuania 1994",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",24,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9998,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",500000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["northing (X)",north,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["easting (Y)",east,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Engineering survey, topographic mapping."],AREA["Lithuania - onshore and offshore."],BBOX[53.89,19.02,56.45,26.82]],ID["EPSG",3346]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=tmerc +lat_0=0 +lon_0=24 +k=0.9998 +x_0=500000 +y_0=0 +ellps=GRS80 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>1304</srsid>
      <srid>3346</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:3346</authid>
      <description>LKS94 / Lithuania TM</description>
      <projectionacronym>tmerc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial miny="5979553.51350000035017729" crs="EPSG:3346" maxx="654061.09999999997671694" maxy="6244919.41390000004321337" minx="309922.032100000011269" dimensions="2" maxz="0" minz="0"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
